name: media-utils
description: Pure utility functions for media URLs and metadata: YouTube URL detection / ID extraction, thumbnail building, duration and view-count formatting, URL classification (youtube / direct / ytdlp). Zero dependencies.
postInstall: Just import what you need — no setup, no env vars, no dependencies
Pairs naturally with ytdlp-wrapper (use classifyMediaUrl to decide whether to call yt-dlp) and video-player-toolkit
